description_long: This is a modern lounge chair featuring a sturdy, angular wooden frame with a rich, dark brown finish. The chair is equipped with thick, light gray cushions on both the seat and backrest, providing comfort and support. The armrests are wide and flat, seamlessly integrated into the frame, and extend outward for ergonomic support. The backrest is slightly reclined, enhancing relaxation, while the seat is broad and inviting. The rear of the chair reveals horizontal wooden slats that reinforce the structure and add a decorative touch. The overall design is minimalist yet elegant, suitable for contemporary urban settings.
description: A modern lounge chair with a dark wooden frame and thick light gray cushions, featuring wide armrests and a slightly reclined backrest.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad seat and backrest cushions, flanked by wide wooden armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the reclined angle of the backrest and the angular wooden frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the horizontal wooden slats and the back of the cushion.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the reclined profile and armrest structure.
